name: Clerk Auth for Next.js
description: Add Clerk authentication to a Next.js App Router project. Includes middleware for protected routes, useUser hook, UserButton component, webhooks for user events, and organization support for multi-tenant SaaS.

steps.description: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY and CLERK_SECRET_KEY from Clerk dashboard
Create Clerk middleware with clerkMiddleware() and route protection rules
Wrap root layout with <ClerkProvider> for global auth context
Add Clerk <SignIn> component with custom redirect URL
Create webhook handler for user.created, user.updated, user.deleted events — sync to your DB
Create getUser() helper for server components and currentUser() for API routes
